mapper.update: UPDATE reminder SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.openid FROM reminder r INNER JOIN user_medicine um ON r.user_medicine_id = um.id INNER JOIN users u ON um.user_id = u.id WHERE r.status = 0 AND r.reminder_time = #{currentTime} AND r.start_date <= CURDATE() AND r.end_date >= CURDATE() AND FIND_IN_SET(#{todayWeek}, r.days_of_week)
mapper.update: UPDATE reminder SET dosage = #{dosage}, reminder_time = #{reminderTime}, days_of_week = #{daysOfWeek}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.openid, mi.name AS medicine_name FROM reminder r INNER JOIN user_medicine um ON r.user_medicine_id = um.id INNER JOIN users u ON um.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN medicine_info mi ON um.medicine_id = mi.id WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status IN (0, 1) AND r.start_date <= CURDATE() AND r.end_date >= CURDATE() AND FIND_IN_SET(WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) + 1, r.days_of_week) ORDER BY r.reminder_time

SELECT r.*, u.openid, mi.name AS medicine_name FROM reminder r INNER JOIN user_medicine um ON r.user_medicine_id = um.id INNER JOIN users u ON um.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN medicine_info mi ON um.medicine_id = mi.id WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status IN (0, 1) AND r.end_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY r.start_date, r.reminder_time
